title: THETA Control Room — Build Hook Delta

changedProjects.lastKnownStatus: Build hook reported latest project state.
changedProjects.nextAction: v0.4.43 — MOCR CHASSIS + TEAL POWER (chassis round 2: user picked 'hmmm v3 but with the teal accent button from v2' then 'teal on' = H-B). PORTED: (1) chassis background is now MOCR grey-green painted steel (EC::chassisHi/Mid/Lo/Edge vertical enamel gradient, 72-660px band; header keeps its dark trim; the 'CHAS' EP:: aging pass rides on top unchanged); (2) module cards are enamel (EC::cardOn/cardOff in EU::cardFill, accent tint reduced 0.105->0.07, borders EC::chassisEdge); (3) module titles + LIMITER title + SUMMING title switch to dark silkscreen ink (EC::silkInk/silkInkDim) per the mockup; (4) blank plates are spare enamel panels; (5) OnOffButton purple lens RETIRED -> naval teal lens (all 10 colour stops remapped; every module/limiter/summing power button is now the teal accent). KEPT DARK deliberately (instrument glass, not painted steel): meter faces, EQ graph, LFO scope, TWEAK hatch, header band, METERING panel. Lit-lens tiles, emerald switches, McIntosh meters untouched. Mockup artifact (2 rounds) at claude.ai/code/artifact/b09e0df1-868f-48cf-a5db-18636eb07d90. VERIFY VISUALLY: whole console reads as one aged grey-green object; amber lamps carry the color; teal power buttons pop; check any remaining light-ink text sitting directly on enamel (labels inside tiles are self-contained and fine). OPEN: visual polish pass after Steve sees it; LIMITER rename.
